privileged_info_summary: The task record_daily_egg_harvest@1 requires creating a Harvest log in farmOS Field Kit with the title 'Daily Egg Collection - Red Barn', quantity of 22 dozen eggs, and notes containing 'oyster shell hopper'. These metadata values are exact specifications from the task description and are correctly used by the verifier to check both UI state (title and type visibility) and trajectory verification (quantity, unit, and notes via VLM analysis). All metadata claims are consistent with the task description and match the expected values that determine task success.
